description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a large patio area with a swimming pool, outdoor dining set, and decorative privacy screens. The house is surrounded by landscaped lawns and paved driveways, with a garage and multiple balconies visible. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The structure is primarily finished in white and gray, with some wooden accents and metal railings. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, balconies, and a spacious patio with a pool. The design is sleek, geometric, and features landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main patio, swimming pool, outdoor dining area, and the house's main facade with large windows and balconies.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, sloped landscaping, and the side elevation of the house with visible balconies.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, upper balconies, and the surrounding landscaped terrain.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the driveway, garage, side landscaping, and a partial view of the pool and patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a small overhang, steps leading up from the driveway, and minimalistic design elements.
